Description: Logged-in user can add a product to wishlist from PDP
Preconditions: User is logged in; in-stock product PDP accessible
Steps: 1. Log in 2. Open PDP 3. Click wishlist icon/button
Expected Result: Product is added to wishlist; wishlist icon state changes to active/filled.
Notes: Vans also supports guest wishlist — see WL-van-001

Description: Wishlist product can be added to cart from the wishlist page
Preconditions: User is logged in; wishlist has in-stock product
Steps: 1. Open wishlist page 2. Click Add to Cart on a product
Expected Result: Product added to cart; header cart count increments.

Description: Product can be removed from the wishlist page
Preconditions: User is logged in; wishlist has product
Steps: 1. Open wishlist page 2. Click Remove on a product

Description: Wishlist icon is visible on the PDP
Expected Result: Wishlist heart icon or Add to Wishlist button is visible.

Description: Wishlist icon is visible on PLP product cards
Expected Result: Wishlist icon/heart button visible on product cards.

Description: Guest user is redirected to login when clicking the wishlist icon
Preconditions: Guest user (not logged in); product on PDP or PLP
Steps: 1. Ensure not logged in 2. Click wishlist icon on PDP or PLP
Expected Result: Login/register flow is triggered; product is NOT silently added to wishlist.
Notes: Vans is excluded — Vans uses guest localStorage wishlist (WL-van-001)

Description: Wishlist icon state updates to active/filled after adding a product
Preconditions: User is logged in (or Vans guest); wishlist feature available
Steps: 1. Open PDP 2. Note wishlist icon state (unfilled) 3. Click wishlist icon
Expected Result: Wishlist icon changes to active/filled state indicating product is wishlisted.

Description: Wishlist page loads with product showing image + name + price
Preconditions: User is logged in; wishlist has a product
Steps: 1. Add product to wishlist 2. Navigate to wishlist page 3. Inspect product card
Expected Result: Product image (not broken), name, and price all visible and non-empty.

Description: Empty wishlist state is shown when wishlist has no products
Preconditions: User is logged in; wishlist is empty
Expected Result: Empty-state message visible; no product rows; continue shopping or browse CTA visible.

Description: Removing the last item from wishlist shows empty state
Preconditions: User is logged in; wishlist has exactly 1 product
Steps: 1. Open wishlist page 2. Remove the product

Description: Removing one item from multi-item wishlist leaves others intact
Preconditions: User is logged in; wishlist has 2+ products
Steps: 1. Open wishlist page 2. Remove one product 3. Inspect remaining items
Expected Result: Only the removed product disappears; other items unchanged.
Notes: Requires adding 2 products to wishlist in setup

Description: Header cart count updates after adding a wishlist item to cart
Preconditions: User is logged in; wishlist has in-stock product
Steps: 1. Note baseline cart count 2. Open wishlist page 3. Add product to cart
Expected Result: Cart count increments by 1 (or qty added).

Description: Wishlist contents persist after page refresh
Preconditions: User is logged in; wishlist has product
Steps: 1. Add product to wishlist 2. Refresh page 3. Open wishlist page

Description: Clicking a wishlist product name or image navigates to its PDP
Steps: 1. Open wishlist page 2. Click product image or name
Expected Result: URL changes to the product's PDP path.

Description: OOS product in wishlist shows unavailable/out-of-stock state
Preconditions: Wishlist contains a product that is OOS
Steps: 1. Open wishlist page with OOS product 2. Inspect product card
Expected Result: OOS state/badge visible; Add to Cart is disabled or unavailable.
Notes: @data-dependent — OOS product may not be reliably reproduced in staging

Description: Wishlist persists after logout and re-login
Preconditions: User is logged in; wishlist has product
Steps: 1. Open wishlist 2. Log out 3. Log in again 4. Open wishlist
Expected Result: Same products still present in wishlist.

Description: Adding a product to wishlist from PDP fires a dataLayer event
Preconditions: Analytics tools available; user logged in
Steps: 1. Intercept dataLayer.push 2. Click wishlist icon on PDP 3. Read captured events
Expected Result: At least one event matching /wishlist|add_to_wishlist/i captured.
Notes: Partial — event fires verified; payload schema not validated

Description: Vans guest wishlist works without login — product saved in localStorage
Preconditions: Vans project; user NOT logged in
Steps: 1. Ensure not logged in 2. Open PDP 3. Click wishlist icon 4. Open wishlist page (or check localStorage)
Expected Result: Product is added to wishlist without login prompt; wishlist icon shows active state; product visible in wishlist page.
Notes: Vans guest wishlist uses localStorage — no account required; unique to Vans per site-structure.md
